---
author: Sam White
toc-title: Contents
toc-depth: 5
toc-location: left
title: Genome Assembly - S.namaycush Siscowet Ecotype with PacBio HiFi Reads Using Flye
date: '2026-03-26'
draft: true
engine: knitr
categories: 
  - "2026"
  - "Genome Assembly"
  - "PacBio"
  - "HiFi Reads"
  - "Flye"
  - "Salvelinus namaycush"
  - "Lake Trout"
  - "Siscowet"
---
